meaning: n.记录员,录音[像]机n.[计] 宏录制器,记录器
examples: He was wired up to a police tape recorder.
The guards permitted me to bring my camera and tape recorder.
Rodney put the recorder on the desk top and pushed the play button.
Scott Graham is the editor in chief of The Recorder, a San Francisco legal publication, and callaw.com.
Ranum's Network Flight Recorder (see Resources), as opposed to host-based detectors such as Tripwire.
